# Evenings

At night I turn the lights down a little. There is no real reason for it. It is just that in the soft light my mind slowly comes loose and settles.

I open my notebook and write down a few things about the day. Some nights it does not come out well, and that is fine. Looking at the words I wrote, I already feel content.

I am not doing anything special. Even so, a quiet stretch of time like this makes the end of the day feel gentle to me.
